title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Wano Citizens, Momonosuke, Unknown person #6, Luffy as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he did not, the embers of hope we were entrusted with...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would have been stuffed out in an instant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He sacrificed himself for the future...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TOO! Don't tell me you ate that fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, why don't I have a bite too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...you would be able to live happily...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: They're Sky Lanterns from the Fire Festival!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everybody, listen up!! There is no doubt about it now...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy drilled Kaido straight down into the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...used his gigantic dragon form to prevent Onigashima from crash landing!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: That pink dragon was momonosuke- Sama?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously?! I had no idea he had a fruit power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We beat two emperors of the sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I never expected us to survive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Since this feud over Oden's regret began... and now it's finally over!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
